# device health

_status: stable · owner: core · id: `device.health`_

## the one command

```
curl -s http://hosaka:8421/api/v1/system/info | jq
```

## why you care

is the box ok? this answers in one shot.

## what it does

Hostname, uptime, services, mode, network, memory, temperature.

## commands

- `/health`
- `/doctor`

## entrypoints

- `GET /api/v1/health`
- `GET /api/v1/system/info`
